concept: Give me a shooter where my weapons fire puzzle pieces that temporarily reconstruct reality when they hit surfaces. Shooting a wall might create a door where none existed, firing at a gap could create a bridge, or targeting enemies might transform them into harmless objects. The reconstructions last for limited time before reality snaps back to its original state, creating urgency in navigation and combat. The protagonist is an architect of possibility spaces, fighting against forces that seek to permanently calcify reality into a single unchangeable form.
